I started with both the birth time choices and decided to
use ChandraHari Ayanamsa and 3652425 year length. (JHora
software). I am reproducing below the mail I sent to client,
who himself is an astrologer.
BT :4.30AM
Ve Sa PP
Mo
Ra
Gu
Natal Chart
Me Rasi
As
Gk Ma Ke
(Ju)

Birth Time Rectification Example (Case Study) 89
BT :6.30AM
Ve GkSa
Mo
Aa
Gu PP
As
Natal Chart
Me Rasi
"Ma Ke
(Ju)
The major change is the Asc. Therefor first I should fix
theAsc.
I) As per your description you have a slight loss of hearing.
Only Saturn in 3rd house can cause it. Pi is the feet of
Kalapurusha and as such 'minor infection in the left feet
(toes) for more than last six months' is just natural for Sa.
This means that currently you are running Sa/Ra Antara
or Paryantara and that, your Asc should be Cp.
2) 'I was born after a brother who passed away before my
birth'. Only Sa in 3rd could cause it. Ve in 3rd also says
